title: The Crew Reaches the White Sea — Part 5
description: The Merry breaks into the sky, leaving Blackbeard and the world below behind as the crew enters a completely new sea.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, this scene centers on Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Usopp, Sanji. The Merry breaks into the sky, leaving Blackbeard and the world below behind as the crew enters a completely new sea.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What! Who is it this time!!?

summary: The Merry breaks into the sky, leaving Blackbeard and the world below behind as the crew enters a completely new sea.
